title: Credential stuffing drives authentication failures
description: Identity and network observations arrive together, forcing agents to distinguish attack traffic from network congestion.

telemetry.statement: Authentication failures rose 40x while network latency and packet loss stayed within baseline.

topology.statement: Failures terminate at public identity gateway id-gw-2; downstream core links remain healthy.

change_history.statement: No identity gateway deployment or policy change occurred during prior 72 hours.

security.statement: Security analytics matched credential-stuffing indicator CS-17 across 312 rotating source addresses.
